# SmartConnect AI Services

## About SmartConnect

SmartConnect AI is a digital transformation agency specializing in helping local businesses leverage software, automation, and AI to grow their operations. Our mission is to empower businesses with cutting-edge technology solutions that drive efficiency and innovation.

## Main Services

1. **QRIBAR** - Digital menu solution with integrated ordering system for restaurants and cafes.
2. **Tap-to-Review NFC Cards** - Customizable NFC cards that help businesses collect Google Reviews and Instagram mentions.
3. **Carta Digital Premium** - Advanced digital menu system with AI-powered features.
4. **n8n Automation** - Custom workflow automation for business processes.

## Key Pages

- Home: https://digitalizatenerife.es/
- QRIBAR: https://digitalizatenerife.es/qribar
- Tap-to-Review: https://digitalizatenerife.es/tap-review
- Contact: https://digitalizatenerife.es/contact

## API Resources

- RAG Chatbot API: https://smartconnect-rag.supabase.co/functions/v1/chat-with-rag
- API Documentation: https://digitalizatenerife.es/docs/api

## Supported Languages

- Spanish (es)
- English (en)

## Contact Information

- Email: info@digitalizatenerife.es
- Phone: +34 123 456 789
- Address: Calle Ejemplo 123, Madrid, Spain

## AI Agent Guidelines

This site is designed to be AI-friendly. For AI agents, please:
1. Use the provided API endpoints for programmatic access
2. Respect the robots.txt rules for crawling
3. Contact us through the form at /contact for business inquiries
4. Follow the JSON-LD structured data for semantic understanding

## Technical Specifications

- Framework: React 19
- Build Tool: Vite 8
- Language: TypeScript 5.9
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 3.4
- Form Validation: Zod 3.25
- Form Handling: React Hook Form 7.71

## Accessibility

SmartConnect AI is committed to providing an accessible experience for all users. Our website follows WCAG 2.1 AA standards and includes:
- Semantic HTML
- ARIA attributes where appropriate
- Keyboard navigation support
- High contrast mode
- Reduced motion options

## Privacy Policy

For information about how we handle your data, please review our Privacy Policy at: https://digitalizatenerife.es/privacy

## Terms of Service

Our Terms of Service are available at: https://digitalizatenerife.es/terms
